heading.description: Short sequential timeline label for the item.

description.description: One specific explanatory sentence tied to the slide objective.
description.example: The start point introduces the first idea students need to follow.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class accepted by the current v2 prompt schema.

items.heading: Start Point
items.description: The start point introduces the first idea students need to follow.

items.heading: Next Point
items.description: The next point explains how the first idea develops into action.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use the current v2 smart-layout item shape: heading and description.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
The generated block must contain exactly the item count requested by the v2 prompt.
No static timelineSequential BlockSpec profile is currently defined in timeline/spec.py; use the v2 prompt's requested item count as the source of truth.
Do not add fields that the v2 prompt does not request.
